name: keywordista-mcp
description: Read and manage your Keywordista App Store keyword tracker from Claude.
long_description: Exposes the running Keywordista server (menubar app or self-hosted Docker) as MCP tools. Read your tracked apps, keywords, rank history, dashboard rollups, and chart movements; add or remove apps and keywords; trigger refreshes and wait for results. Auto-discovers the local server via env var, runtime sidecar, or port probe.

tools.name: keyword_history
tools.description: Rank-check timeline for a keyword (optionally one app).

tools.name: dashboard
tools.description: Current rank rollup for every (keyword × app), optionally filtered by country.

tools.name: chart_movements
tools.description: Current chart positions plus recent entered/moved/exited events.

tools.name: add_app
tools.description: Track a new app by App Store ID.

tools.name: add_keyword
tools.description: Track a new keyword in a given country; optionally wait for the first rank.

tools.name: refresh
tools.description: Trigger a refresh (single keyword, all keywords, charts, or app storefront availability) and poll until done.

base_url.title: Keywordista base URL (optional)
base_url.description: Override the auto-discovered server URL, e.g. http://127.0.0.1:8080 or your Docker host.
